title: Proclamation No. 1125, s. 1997
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION No. 1125

DECLARING AN AREA OF PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CALBIGA, WRIGHT AND HINABANGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AS CALBIGA CAVES PROTECTED LANDSCAPE

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources and pursuant to the powers vested in me by law, I, FIDEL V. RAMOS , President of the Republic of the Philippines do hereby set aside and declare an area of public domain situated in the Municipalities of Calbiga, Wright and Hinabangan, Province of Samar as protected area under the category of PROTECTED LANDSCAPE pursuant to R.A. 7586, otherwise known as the NIPAS Act of 1992, subject to private rights, if any, as shown in the DENR Map No. NIPAS RO8-14, more particularly described as follows:

Beginning at a point marked “1” of the DENR Map No. NIPAS RO8-14 being identical to corner No. 15 of Alienable and Disposable, Block I, Project No. 36, LC Map No. 1854 about 1,800 meters South 84 degree East from junction of the National Road and Majacob Creek;

thence S 82º 14′ E, 8,812 meters to point 2; thence Due South, 2,070 meters to point 3; thence S 46º 10′ W, 800 meters to point 4; thence S 63º 00′ W, 760 meters to point 5; thence S 66º 50′ W, 510 meters to point 6; thence N 73º 30′ W, 700 meters to point 7; thence N 72º 20′ W, 990 meters to point 8; thence S 79º 10′ W, 890 meters to point 9; thence N 81º 30′ W, 400 meters to point 10; thence N 74º 10′ W, 585 meters to point 11; thence N 68º 00′ W, 475 meters to point 12; thence S 72º 30′ W, 795 meters to point 13; thence N 54º 30′ W, 300 meters to point 14; thence S 66º 30′ W, 375 meters to point 15; thence N 48º 40′ W, 175 meters to point 16; thence N 67º 20′ W, 740 meters to point 17; thence N 66º 00′ W, 800 meters to point 18; thence N 34º 25′ W, 475 meters to point 19; thence N 34º 00′ W, 360 meters to point 20; thence N 37º 30′ W, 340 meters to point 21; thence S 82º 00′ W, 100 meters to point 22; thence Due West, 160 meters to point 23; thence N 41º 00, W, 300 meters to point 24; thence N 16º 45′ E, 400 meters to point 25; thence N 24º 00′ E, 400 meters to point 26; thence N 12º 15′ E, 775 meters to point 27; thence N 41º 40′ E, 310 meters to point 28; thence N 54º 00′ E, 250 meters to point 29; thence N 44º 30′ E, 100 meters to point 1 which is the point of beginning.

Containing an area of TWO THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED SIXTY-EIGHT (2,968) HECTARES, more or less, subject to ground survey.

The said area shall be known as the Calbiga Caves Protected Landscape as categorized and defined under the National Integrated Protected Area System (NIPAS) Act of 1992, the administration of which shall be under the control of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) in coordination with the local government units concerned, and in accordance with the provisions of the NIPAS Act.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 4th day of November in the year of Our Lord, Nineteen Hundred and Ninety Seven.

(Sgd.) FIDEL V. RAMOS

By the President: (Sgd.) LUIS C. LIWANAG II Acting Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
